title: Cobblemon ✖ Oh my, Meteors! integration
description: Adds Cobblemon Evolution Stone ores to Oh my, Meteors
body:
# Ever thought that [OhMyMeteors](https://modrinth.com/mod/ohmymeteors) is a really cool mod?

Maybe you even thought that it will be cool to have a [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) integration?

What if meteors from that mod will also carry evolution stone ores?

This datapack does exactly that!

### Features
- Adds custom meteors that carry evolution stone ores.

### Credits
- Very cool asteroid sprite made by [B3amerbo1](https://b3amerbo1.itch.io/)
